title: mentha × palatina var. scribae
intro: Mentha × palatina var. scribae, also known as Scribner's pennyroyal or narrow-leaved pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is a hybrid of Mentha pulegium and Mentha × piperita. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its high content of essential oils, which include pulegone, menthone, and limonene. The health benefits of Mentha × palatina var. scribae include its ability to aid digestion, relieve symptoms of menopause, and exhibit antiseptic properties, among others. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be obtained through steam distillation or solvent extraction.
